_comment: Copy this file to config.json and replace the values with YOUR OWN. config.json is git-ignored and will never be committed.
_comment_api_key: Your official API key from platform.pixai.art (set its lifetime up to ~2 years). Sent as the Bearer credential for ALL calls, so there is NO expiring browser token to capture. This is the only credential that ever needs refreshing.
_comment_user_id: Your PixAI numeric user ID. NOT in the address bar (PixAI uses @username in URLs). Capture from DevTools -> Network -> graphql -> a listUserTaskSummaries row -> Payload -> variables.userId. See README Step 2.
_comment_hash: From the same listUserTaskSummaries request: extensions.persistedQuery.sha256Hash. Only changes if PixAI overhauls their frontend.
_comment_full_meta: Optional - only for --full-meta / --backfill-full-meta. Capture getTaskById's sha256Hash from an image detail page (see README -> Full Meta). MODEL_DETAIL_HASH has a working default; only set it if model names stop resolving.
_comment_legacy: Legacy fallback ONLY if you are not using PIXAI_API_KEY. U3T is the 'u3t' field on the same Payload tab; the short-lived Bearer token then goes in token.txt / PIXAI_TOKEN / --token and must be re-captured every few hours. Leave U3T blank when using an API key.
